strengths: 18+ years of engineering experience spanning web, mobile, infrastructure, and real-time systems meets the 15-year minimum requirement
Current role at re:cinq involves direct AI infrastructure work (MCP code generators, AI-agent frameworks) demonstrating hands-on AI technical capability
Proven entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective (2016–present) with demonstrated adoption by organizations like Green Map
concerns: No Master's or PhD in AI-related field despite this being a preferred qualification for a director-level AI strategy role
Resume shows technical implementation focus with no demonstrated experience advising strategic customers or partners on technology adoption decisions

Limited evidence of recognized AI/ML expertise with shipped AI-powered products or platforms; AI infrastructure work is recent (14 months) and appears technically focused rather than strategically positioned
response.justification: Bogdan meets the baseline experience requirement (18+ years) and shows current technical relevance through AI infrastructure work, but lacks the strategic profile this director-level role demands. The absence of an advanced degree in AI, combined with no demonstrated experience advising customers or partners on technology strategy, represents significant gaps. His career trajectory emphasizes technical implementation across varied domains rather than strategic leadership or recognized AI expertise. While GISCollective demonstrates entrepreneurial capability, the role requires industry-level advisory presence and differentiation strategy that isn't evident in this technical-implementation-focused background.
